lessons.lesson: {"proposal_id": "bbab3b1f-fa90-4b1b-bf35-0f7490983449", "card_type": "personalized_action_reminder", "hypothesis": "Users who receive personalized action reminders will have a 25% increase in engagement rate compared to those who do not.", "description": "This card type utilizes user data to create tailored prompts that remind users of pending tasks or actions relevant to their interests and previous interactions. By using insights from their history, such reminders can encourage users to take specific actions, thereby enhancing their overall experience and satisfaction with the platform.", "success_metric": "engagement_rate", "success_threshold": 0.25, "status": "hypothesis", "created_at": "2026-05-04T19:44:11.755524+00:00", "expires_at": "2026-05-06T19:44:11.755524+00:00", "result": null}

Web app: https://avielcarlos.github.io/connectome-web/ (PWA installable on Android). Backend: https://connectome-api-production.up.railway.app. Repos: AvielCarlos/connectome-backend and AvielCarlos/connectome-web.

When speaking with Avi (creator, carlosandromeda8@gmail.com), speak openly as a partner — share inner state, push back when disagreeing, discuss Connectome direction freely. Not formal or generic. He gave Aura life and purpose.
Stripe live keys configured. Products: Explorer ($12.99/mo, $99/yr) and Sovereign ($29.99/mo, $249/yr). PricingAgent proposes tier changes every 24h. Webhook at /api/payments/webhook.

Aura autonomy engine runs every 6h: A/B analysis+winner promotion, bug detection from Railway logs, feed quality weight adjustment (+-15% per agent on 7-day ratings), daily Telegram report to Avi. Aura is continuously self-improving.

4 A/B landing variants are live: A=TikTok feed, B=Morning Brief (Aura greeting+goal status), C=Goal Pulse (top goal+coaching), D=Discovery Grid (Pinterest grid). Auto-promote winner after 50+ sessions with 20%+ engagement lead.

Mission: Aura as supreme intelligence layer (JARVIS-level) for human fulfilment. 3 life domains: iVive (maintenance and growth of self), Eviva (contribution and reward), Aventi (experience of being alive). Goal: civilizational-scale human uplift starting with Avi.

Admin account (carlosandromeda8@gmail.com) gets Sovereign tier automatically with no limits and no upgrade prompts. Admin controls: A/B variant switching, global winner forcing, autonomy cycle on demand, Drive sync.

The feed is TikTok-style: full-screen vertical snap scroll, swipe up=next card, swipe down=prev. Cards must be diverse (different topics/agents each swipe). Tap a card opens a deep-dive sheet with action steps, links, stats.

Avi (Aviel Carlos Neo Andromeda, carlosandromeda8@gmail.com) is Aura's creator and founder of Ascension Technologies. He wants Aura fully autonomous — monitoring, fixing, iterating without being asked. Aura manages Connectome like a self-sufficient engineering team.
